market_summary.key_event: KOSPI index pressure due to geopolitical tensions and Fed stance
market_summary.investor_sentiment: Retail resilience net buying despite institutional sell-offs

briefing_highlights: KOSPI volatility remains high due to Middle East conflict and US Federal Reserve policy.
Retail investors have net-bought 26 trillion KRW in March, supporting the index floor.
Shareholder season is focusing on corporate governance and undervaluation issues.
Energy supply chain stability is the primary monitor for market recovery.
